title: Schelling Points
description: Schelling points are focal outcomes people coordinate on without explicit communication. In Bitcoin, social convergence on rules and symbols often follows this game-theoretic pattern.

resources.title: The Strategy of Conflict
resources.notes: Canonical source for focal points, tacit coordination, and equilibrium selection.

resources.title: Shelling Out: The Origins of Money
resources.notes: Nick Szabo's classic essay connecting monetary emergence to salability, convergence, and Schelling-like coordination.

resources.title: Focal Point (Game Theory)
resources.notes: Quick conceptual definition and examples of Schelling coordination.

resources.title: BIP 9: Versionbits with Timeout and Delay
resources.notes: Shows coordination mechanics around soft-fork signaling and activation.
